meaning: n.合法,墨守陈规,法律上的义务
examples: The arrangement is of doubtful legality.
The court will rule on the legality of the action.
The auditor has questioned the legality of the contracts.
Mr Andrews has previously described questions over the legality of Wales' fees policy as "tosh".
That meant that national debates can affect not only identification, but opinions on legality.
